summary: Iteration 181: Set-Password Bug Fix & InviterModal One-Time Logic Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin login works, Dashboard loads successfully, InviterModal does NOT appear for admin users (correct behavior based on role exclusion logic).
critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 VERIFIED FIXED: SetPasswordRequest.secret_code is now Optional[str] = None (line 46 auth_routes.py) - endpoint returns 400 'Email not verified' instead of 422 validation error
BUG 2 VERIFIED FIXED: InviterModal shows based on !user.referred_by (permanent check) instead of sessionStorage (per-session). Admin roles correctly excluded via line 148 condition
Login response correctly includes referred_by field for InviterModal logic
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 181 verified two critical bug fixes: 1) set-password endpoint no longer returns 422 for missing secret_code - Pydantic model accepts Optional[str] = None. 2) InviterModal uses user.referred_by (permanent) instead of sessionStorage (per-session) - admin roles are correctly excluded. Both fixes working correctly.

test_set_password_without_secret_code_no.notes: CRITICAL: Returns 400 'Email not verified' not 422 validation error

test_set_password_with_secret_code_backw.notes: With secret_code still works - backward compatible

test_set_password_validation_still_works.notes: Password length validation returns 400 for short passwords

test_set_inviter_endpoint_exists.notes: POST /api/referrals/set-inviter returns proper error for invalid inviter

test_login_response_has_all_inviter_moda.notes: Login response has role and referred_by for InviterModal logic

test_admin_should_not_see_inviter_modal.notes: Admin role correctly excluded from InviterModal

admin_login_successful.notes: Admin logs in and redirects to dashboard

dashboard_loads.notes: Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Ryan!' with full content

no_inviter_modal_for_admin.notes: InviterModal NOT visible for admin user (correct behavior)

missing_api_keys_modal_dismissable.notes: 'Remind Me Later' button works to dismiss modal

bug_1_set_password_422_error.issue: POST /api/auth/set-password returned 422 'secret_code field required' when frontend sent only {email, password}
bug_1_set_password_422_error.fix: SetPasswordRequest.secret_code changed from str to Optional[str] = None
bug_1_set_password_422_error.evidence: Endpoint now returns 400 with business logic error ('Email not verified') instead of 422 validation error

bug_2_inviter_modal_showing_every_sessio.issue: InviterModal appeared every session because it used sessionStorage to track dismissal
bug_2_inviter_modal_showing_every_sessio.fix: Changed to check user.referred_by (permanent field) - modal only shows when !user.referred_by
bug_2_inviter_modal_showing_every_sessio.evidence: Admin user (excluded by role) does not see modal, modal logic now uses permanent referred_by field
